stemHtml:
Given the following information, which radial is the aircraft on?

The position of the aircraft is (N55°00', W070°00').
The variation at the aircraft's position is 21°W.
VOR is situated at position (N50°00', W065°00').
The variation at the VOR is 19°W.
The initial magnetic track of the great circle from the aircraft position to the VOR is 168°.
